title: Can sync specify the os/arch per image?
body:
I'm aware of the system-wide `--override-os` and `--override-arch`, but these argments apply to all of the images in the skopeo yaml file (if `--src yaml` is used). Is there a recommended strategy for overriding this per image in the config file?

Alternatively, I was going to maintain multiple yaml files which represent the arch/os I want and try running multiple sync commands with (duplicated, or different) image lists and different values for the --override-* args

Thoughts? Strategies?
